Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 5, 268 [lunar and planetary observations][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

AN.GE₆ 30

(o 1) Eclipses of the Moon.

o 22

[MU 2 m]⸢ar⸣-taḫ-ša₂-si-iš GU₄ BE DIB DU₆ 5 ITI ⸢DIB⸣

(o 2) [Year 2 of] Artaxerxes, in Ayyaru (Month II) it passed by. In Tašritu (VII), (after) 5 months, it passed by.

o 33

[...] n+1 ME NIM MU 3 KIN DIB ⸢55?⸣ ana ⸢ŠU₂⸣ [20]  ; ŠE DIB 1.16 ME ⸢NIM⸣

(o 3) [...] ... in the daylight of sunrise. Year 3, in Ululu (VI) it passed by. 55° before sunset. In Addaru (XII) it passed by. 76° in the daylight of sunrise.

o 44

[...] DIB MU 3 KIN BE DIB ŠE BE DIB

(o 4) [...] it passed by. Year 3, in Ululu (VI) ... it passed by, in Addaru (XII) it passed by.

o 55

[...] ⸢GUB⸣ DIRI.ŠE 10 LAL₂ BAR 29 ŠU₂ SIG 13 GUB⸢iz?⸣

(o 5) [...] solstice. Equinox on intercalary Addaru (XII) 10. On Nisannu (I) 29, it made its (last) setting. On Simanu 13 (II), it stood (in solstice).

o 66

[...] ⸢17⸣ 3 KUŠ₃ ina IGI RIN₂ ŠU₂ DU₆ 14 3 KUŠ₃ ar₂ RIN₂ e-lat

(o 6) [...] (day) 17 it made its (last) setting 3 cubits in front of the Scales. On Tašritu (VII) 14, [...] 3 cubits behind the Scales (and) above […] it became stationary in the Scorpion. It retrograded to the east. Addaru (XII) was intercalary.

o 77

[...] GIR₂.TAB UŠ ana NIM LA₂is ŠE DIRI

o 88

[...] ⸢SAG?⸣ GIR₂.TAB UŠ ana ŠU₂ LA₂ KIN 29 ina GIR₂.TAB ŠU₂

(o 8) It become stationary in the head of Scorpion. It retrograded to the west. On Ululu (VI) 29, it made its (last) setting in the Scorpion.

o 99

[...] ⸢ZIZ₂?⸣ 2 ar₂ 4-AM₃ IGI-MEŠ! ša₂ PA UŠ ana ŠU₂ LA₂ ŠE DIRI

(o 9) [...] on Šabatu (XI) 2, it became stationary behind the 4 front ones of Pabilsag. It retrograded to the west. Addaru (XII) was intercalary.

o 1010

[...] 28 KI? šil-taḫ PA UŠ ana NIM LA₂

(o 10) [...] (day) 28 it became stationary in the region of Pabilsag's Arrow. It retrograded to the east. [...] it made its (last) setting [...] of Pabilsag. On Kislimu (IX) 13, it made its (first) appearance at the end of Pabilsag.

o 1111

[...] ša₂ PA ŠU₂ GAN 13 ina TIL PA IGI

o 1212

[...] 25 : ina ŠU₂ ina IGI ḪUN.GA₂ ŠU₂ ŠE <<x>> DIRI

(o 12) [...] (day) 25 : it made its (last) setting in the west in front of the Hireling. Addaru (XII) was intercalary.

o 1313

[...] 2? : ina NIM ina ḪUN.GA₂ IGI APIN 28 : 24

(o 13) [...] (day) 2 : it made its (first) appearance in the east in the Hireling. On Arahsamnu (VIII) 28 (or): 24 […]. : On Ṭebetu (X) 28 : it made its (first) appearance in the west in the Great One.

o 1414

[...] : AB 28 : ina ŠU₂ ina GU IGI

o 1515

[...] ⸢13⸣ : ⸢10⸣ ina? ŠU₂ ina PA ŠU₂ 24 : 21 : ina NIM ina šil-taḫ  ; PA IGI ŠE DIRI

(o 15) [...] (day) 13 (or): 10 it made its (last) setting in the west in Pabilsag. (Day) 24 (or) : 21 : it made its (first) appearance in the east in Pabilsag's Arrow. Addaru (XII) was intercalary.

Reverse
r 1r 1

[...] ŠU ⸢15 5 KUŠ₃⸣ ina IGI AB₂ UR.A IGI ⸢ina? MU? NE? GUB?⸣

(r 1) [(Year 2, Mars.) Duʾuzu] (day) 15, it made its (first) appearance 5 cubits in front of ... of the Lion. It stood [...] ...

r 22

[... DIRI].⸢ŠE⸣ EN 6 ana NIM ki UŠu₂ ina ⸢IGI ŠA⸣ x x x ⸢UŠ⸣

(r 2) [...] intercalary Addaru (XII/2) until (day) 6, when it became stationary to the east, it became stationary in front of ... .

r 33

⸢15?⸣ x x x DIRI U? ŠE? GU₄ EN ⸢18?⸣ ana ⸢ŠU₂⸣ ki ⸢UŠ?a⸣ 2/3 ⸢KUŠ₃⸣

(r 3) (day) 15 …. In Ayyaru (II) until (day) 18, when it became stationary to the west, it became stationary 2/3 cubit towards Lisi, not reaching (it). From (day) 26 it retrograded to the east. Addaru (XII) was intercalary.

r 44

⸢ana SI₄⸣ la₃ KUR UŠ ⸢TA? 26?⸣ ana NIM LA₂ ŠE DIRI

r 55

⸢MU⸣ 4? GU₄ 1 ar₂ ⸢ŠU?⸣ x x x x ša₂ SIPA? ŠU₂ NE n+12 ina IGI GIŠ.KUN A  ; 2 UŠ IGI x ⸢DU₃⸣

(r 5) Year 4, on Ayyaru (II) 1, it made its (last) setting behind ... of the Shepherd. On Abu (V) 12, it made its (first) appearance 2 degrees in front of the Lion’s Tail.

r 66

MU 2 ⸢d⸣GENNA DU₆ 28 5 UŠ ina IGI RIN₂ IGI ⸢ZIZ₂? 1 1 KUŠ₃? 8 SI?⸣

(r 6) Year 2, Saturn. On Tašritu (Month VII) 28, it appeared 5 degrees in front of the Scales. On Šabatu (XI) 1, it became stationary 1 cubit, 8 fingers above the Scales. It retrograded to the west.

r 77

e-lat RIN₂ UŠ ana ⸢ŠU₂? LA₂? MU⸣ 3 GU₄ 26 ina IGI RIN₂ ša₂ U₁₈ UŠ

(r 7) Year 3, Ayyaru (II) 26, it became stationary in front of the south of the Scales. On Simanu (III) 2 it retrograded to the east. On Ululu (VI) 5, it made its (last) setting 2 cubits in front of the Scales. I did not watch.

r 88

⸢SIG 2?⸣ ana NIM LA₂ ⸢KIN 5 2 KUŠ₃⸣ ina IGI RIN₂ ŠU₂ ⸢NU⸣ PAP DU₆ 19 6? SI?

(r 8) On Tašritu (VII) 19 it made its (first) appearance 6 fingers behind the south of the Scales . ON Ṭebetu (X) 20, it became stationary 7 degrees in front of the Scorpion's head.

r 99

ar₂ RIN₂ ša₂ ⸢U₁₈⸣ IGI ⸢AB?⸣ 20 7 UŠ ina IGI SAG!(KA) GIR₂.TAB ⸢UŠ!⸣

r 1010

MU 4 SIG [x] ana ŠU₂ ki UŠa ina IGI RIN₂ ša₂ U₁₈ UŠ DU₆ ina ⸢4?⸣ x [x] x x x NU? PAP?

(r 10) Year 4, on Simanu (III) [(day) x], when it became stationary to the west it became stationary in front of the south of the Scales. In Tašritu (VII) from (day) 4 …. I did not watch.

r 1111

APIN 13 ina IGI SAG! GIR₂.TAB IGI NIM ina 11 IGI SI? ... ⸢UŠ?⸣ x [...] x

(r 11) On Arahsamnu (VIII) 13, it made its (first) appearance in front of the Scorpion's head. It was high. It (should have) appeared on (day) 11. … [...]

r 1212

MU 2 GU₄.U₄ NE 15 ina NIM ar₂ LUGAL IGI : KIN ⸢9 ina NIM ina SAG⸣ UR.A ŠU₂

(r 12) Year 2, Mercury. On Abu (V) 15, it made its (first) appearance in the east behind the King. : On Ululu (VI) 9, it made its (last) setting in the east in the head of the Lion.

r 1313

x ⸢NU PAP⸣ APIN 2 ina ŠU₂ ḫi-pi₂16 ina A ⸢ŠU₂ ina⸣ PA ŠU₂ ⸢GAN?⸣ 1 ina NIM ar₂ SI₄ IGI

(r 13) …. I did not watch. On Arahsamnu (VIII) 1 in the west (gloss: break). (Day) 16, it made its (last) setting in the west in Pabilsag. On Kislimu (IX) 1 it made its (first) appearance in the east behind Lisi.

r 1414

[...] x [x] ⸢SUḪUR?⸣.MAŠ₂ ŠU₂ ZIZ₂ ⸢14?⸣ ina ŠU₂ ina GU IGI : ŠE 10 ina ŠU₂ ina SIM ŠU₂

(r 14) [...] it made its (last) setting [in the east] in the Goatfish. It made its (first) appearance in the west in the Great One. : On Addaru (XII) 10, it made its (last) setting in the west in the Swallow.

r 1515

[...] x ⸢ina NIM⸣ ina ⸢KUN?-ME?⸣ IGI 28 ina NIM ina DUR SIM ŠU₂ : MU 3 BAR [(x)]

(r 15) […] it made its (first) appearance in the east in the Tails. On (day) 28, it set in the Swallow's band. : Year 3, on Nisannu (I)

r 1616

[...] ŠU₂ ina IGI MAŠ.MAŠ IGI : SIG 14 ina ŠU₂ ina IGI LUGAL ⸢ŠU₂ ŠU?⸣ 11 ina NIM [...]

(r 16) [...] it made its (first) appearance [in] the west in front of the Twins. : On Simanu (II) 14, it made its (last) setting in the west in front of the King. On Duʾuzu (IV) 11 in the east [...].

Top
t.e. 1t.e. 1

[...] x ina NIM ina SAG!(KA) UR.A ŠU₂ : KIN 24 ina [x x] GIR₂.TAB IGI

(t.e. 1) [...], it made its (last) setting in the east, in the Lion's head. On Ululu (VI) 24, it made its (first) appearance in [...] the Scorpion.

t.e. 22

[x] 7 ina ŠU₂ ina IGI šil-taḫ PA ŠU₂ 26 ina ḫi-pi₂ eš-šu₂U ar₂

(t.e. 2) [...] (day) 7, it made its (last) setting in the west in front of Pablisag's arrow. (Day) 26, [...] in (gloss: new break) […] finger(s) behind [...]. : On Kislimu (IX) 8, [...] in the east (or): ....

t.e. 33

[...] : GAN 8 ina NIM ŠU₂ [...]
